layout_note: Standard (non-transposed) Schedule A grid continuation of the ARECO LP portfolio (MAI funds, real estate, country/golf clubs, warehouse fund). No group header rows on this page. Fund rows carry EIF (Excepted Investment Fund) checked; the two country/golf club rows do not. Most rows show 'PTRN' in the Block C Other Type of Income column; several rows show a Block C NONE checkbox with Block D None. Block E (Transaction) shows 'P' (purchase) for four rows: MAI Wealth Income and Growth IV (SP and DC) and MAI Diversified Real Estate Income (SP and DC). Block B value columns and Block D amount columns sit over heavy grey shading; exact value bucket is low-confidence. Block B: A=None,B=$1-$1,000,C=$1,001-$15,000,D=$15,001-$50,000,E=$50,001-$100,000,F=$100,001-$250,000,G=$250,001-$500,000,H=$500,001-$1,000,000,I=$1,000,001-$5,000,000,J=$5,000,001-$25,000,000,K=$25,000,001-$50,000,000,L=Over $50,000,000,M=Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000. Block D: I=None,II=$1-$200,III=$201-$1,000,IV=$1,001-$2,500,V=$2,501-$5,000,VI=$5,001-$15,000,VII=$15,001-$50,000,VIII=$50,001-$100,000,IX=$100,001-$1,000,000,X=$1,000,001-$5,000,000,XI=Over $5,000,000,XII=Spouse/DC Asset with income over $1,000,000.

uncertainties.note: Block B value columns are heavily shaded; exact value bucket is low-confidence for every asset row
MAI Wealth Income and Growth IV (SP) value X is at the far-right of Block B; could be col I/L rather than the M spouse catch-all
Barrington Golf Club (SP) amount X reads in the shaded far-right of Block D and could be col X ($1,000,001-$5,000,000) or a considerably lower bucket
amount X's fall in the shaded right half of Block D; adjacent-column error possible
